exort.message.debug_load_usage: Utilisation: /exort debug benchmark start [joueurs] [secondes] | /exort debug benchmark stop

exort.message.debug_load_summary: Modèle du benchmark: joueurs %1$s, chunks %2$s, stockages/chunk %3$s, bus/chunk %4$s, moniteurs/chunk %5$s, ops/tick estimées %6$s (global %7$s, chunk %8$s), db/tick %9$s, mises à jour de moniteur %10$s/t%11$s, wire %12$s/%13$s miss %14$s%% cover %15$s%%, fenêtre mesurée %16$ss après la préparation (min warmup %17$ss), jitter %18$s%%, guard players %19$s, guard entities %20$s/%21$s, guard churn %22$s/tick, world lanes %23$s, world ops/tick %24$s, world blocks %25$s, water-test wire length %26$s, water sources %27$s, water extra chunks %28$s

exort.message.debug_load_hints: Indices du benchmark synthétique: dominant %1$s; CPU %2$s%%, WIRE %3$s%%, DISPLAYS %4$s%%, DB %5$s%%, WIRELESS %6$s%%, GUARDS %7$s%%, WORLD %8$s%% (placements %9$s).

exort.message.debug_load_recent_runs: Exécutions récentes (%1$s): TPS avg %2$s, MSPT avg %3$s, MSPT p95 %4$s.
